title: Pizza Time
summary:
After leaving the Escalante area, we had scheduled a stay at a Harvest Host near Boulder, UT. We were excited to take a shower and use our monthly dining out budget at a nice restaurant. However, when we arrived, we learned that the restaurant was closed for the season and would not be open until the following day. We decided against staying there and instead used the remaining daylight to drive to Torrey, UT where we got Pizza for dinner at the Rim Rock Patio (and a delicious bundt cake dessert). We then found a nice little dispersed camping spot just down the road. In the morning, I went for a little run and had some pain in my hip significantly slow me down. I had an old injury flare up after my race which was then exacerbated by slipping while hiking along the Escalante River. Unfortunately, this led me to decide to drop out of my upcoming 100k race. But on the bright side, now I have plenty of bonus time for climbing, biking and other fun activities that I otherwise wouldn't have had as much time for!

-Colin
